This is a follow-up email on the brand's sponsorship of the infamous local KOL, Spoon Chan (@khengchan_), detailing the proof of her providing false trade descriptions during a recent second-hand sale and plagiarising other KOLs and providing false trade descriptions.

FALSE TRADE DESCRIPTIONS
In April, Spoon Chan started to sell second-hand bags and clothes in which some of them have been marked up higher than the original price. Please note that the case has been reported to the Customs and Excise Department.

COPYING IDEAS FROM @PUMPKINJENN AND @TINAWZQ

Every influencer who pays significant effort and genuine respect for originality is highly appreciated. However, under no circumstances are plagiarism and dishonesty acceptable.
